name: BizerOS Chat
short_desc: Self-hosted team chat for BizerOS — a Mattermost fork with a bundled Postgres.
author: kelsi-bizer
description: BizerOS Chat is the in-house team-chat platform for the BizerOS ecosystem — a fork of [Mattermost](https://mattermost.com) packaged for one-click install on Bizeros. It keeps Mattermost's full feature set (channels, threads, DMs, file sharing, search, integrations, mobile / desktop apps) and rebrands the user-facing surface for the Bizeros ecosystem. Image: `ghcr.io/kelsi-bizer/bizeros-chat`. Currently linux/amd64 only.

form_fields.label: Site Name
form_fields.hint: Display name shown in the BizerOS Chat UI (maps to MM_TEAMSETTINGS_SITENAME).

form_fields.label: Admin Email
form_fields.hint: Email surfaced in the chat UI as the support / admin contact.

form_fields.label: Postgres Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated password for the bundled Postgres `mmuser` role; rotating it requires manually updating the DB role.
